prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约13177→12837→13089→11622→11142，整体呈波动前移趋势，近3年累计前移约1947名；2025年基准约11142名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为93→96→97→103→105人，持续小幅扩招；2026年计划119人，较2025年增加14人（+13.3%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作 用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第57名，较2021年（第62名）稳步上升，近年排名持续提升；2024年声誉中性/混合（师德问题调查 后学校积极回应）；抖音热度总排名第7（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A-、化学A- ，化工与材料学科实力突出，与该校工科试验班（先进材料、化工与能源等）招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐， 电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，化工材料类（生化环材）仍偏劝退，但该校化工为A级优势学科，对专业热度有正向修正；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人 增加约34032人（+19.7%），竞争显著加剧；北京化工大学位于北京，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在陕西物理类招生占 比约2.5%–3%，属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次前移趋势、2026年计划扩招13.3%缓解部分竞争压力、本省物理类考生大幅增加19.7%加剧竞争、学校软科排名持 续上升提升吸引力、抖音高热反映关注度高等因素，在2025年基准11142名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约11833名，区间11333–12333名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）（化学工程与工艺（英才班）、高分子材料与工程（精英班）、生物工程（高精尖班））
- 计算机科学与技术
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 工科试验班（智能信息类）（电子信息工程、人工智能）
- 材料科学与工程（材料、大数据双学士学位）
- 理科试验班（数学统计类）（应用统计学、数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）（高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（化工与能源）（化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、氢能科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（生物与医药）（生物工程、生物医学工程、制药工程）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学）（应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11333–12333名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（11333名以内）可重点冲刺宏德书院、计算机科学与技术等 王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（12333名附近）建议优先选择三档工科试验班（先进材料/化工与能源）保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 13177 → 12837 → 13089 → 11622 → 11142, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1947 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 11142; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 93 → 96 → 97 → 103 → 105, with continuous small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 119, an increase of 14 (+13.3%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 57th, steadily rising from 62nd in 2021, with continuous improvement in recent years; 2024 reputation is neutral/mixed (the school responded positively after the teacher ethics investigation); Douyin heat total ranking 7th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; no obvious record of admission cutoff breaks; Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Chemistry A-, with outstanding strength in chemical and materials disciplines, highly corresponding to the school's engineering experimental classes (Advanced Materials, Chemical Engineering and Energy, etc.) enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication and other majors are highly recommended with high social heat, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Chemical and Materials categories (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) are still somewhat discouraged, but the school's Chemical Engineering is an A-level advantageous discipline, which positively corrects major popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi examinees; the school's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi Physics Category is about 2.5%–3%, at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical ranking forward trend, the 2026 plan expansion of 13.3% partially alleviating competition pressure, the significant 19.7% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, and the high Douyin heat reflecting high attention, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 11142; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11833, with a range of 11333–12333.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy) (Chemical Engineering and Technology (Elite Class), Polymer Materials and Engineering (Elite Class), Bioengineering (High-End Class))
- Computer Science and Technology
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation Class (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Information) (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics) (Applied Statistics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Energy) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biology and Medicine) (Bioengineering, Biomedical Engineering, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry) (Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11333–12333, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11333), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Hongde Academy and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12333), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes (Advanced Materials/Chemical Engineering and Energy) as a safety net.
